title: Wobble board
abstract: A wobble board comprises a platform, a base having a generally flat bottom surface, and at least one compressible member positioned intermediate the platform and the base such that the platform is pivotable with respect to the base.
claims: Claims What is claimed is: 1. A wobble board comprising: a platform; a base having a generally flat bottom surface; and at least one compressible member positioned intermediate the platform and the base such that the platform is pivotable with respect to the base. 2. The wobble board of claim 1 wherein the at least one compressible member compresses in response to an axial force being applied thereto. 3. The wobble board of claim 1 or 2, further comprising an adjustment mechanism configured to adjust a level of compression of the at least one compressible member. 4. The wobble board of claim 3 when dependent on claim 2, wherein the axial force is at least partially from the adjustment mechanism. 5. The wobble board of claim 3 wherein the adjustment mechanism comprises a threaded member connecting the platform to the base. 6. The wobble board of claim 5 wherein rotation of the platform relative to the base via the threaded member adjusts the level of compression of the at least one compressible member. 7. The wobble board of claim 6 wherein the wobble board is adjustable and useable in a single mode. 8. The wobble board of claim 6 further comprising a locking mechanism configured to set the wobble board in use mode or adjustment mode. 9. The wobble board of claim 8 wherein in a first position, the locking mechanism sets the wobble board to use mode, and in a second position, the locking mechanism sets the wobble board to adjustment mode. 10. The wobble board of claim 9 wherein the locking mechanism is rotatable between the first and second positions. 11. The wobble board of claim 10 wherein the locking mechanism is positioned on a top surface of the platform. 12. The wobble board of claim 10 wherein the locking mechanism comprises: an interlocking plate positioned on the top surface of the platform and comprising at least one inclined groove; and a disc comprising a plurality of teeth positioned within an opening of the platform adjacent the interlocking plate, the disc having at least one locking member projecting from a surface thereof. 13. The wobble board of claim 12, wherein in the first position, the locking member is positioned within the inclined groove at a lowest point thereof, and in the second position the locking member is positioned within the inclined groove at a highest position thereof. 14. The wobble board of claim 3 wherein the greater the level of compression of the at least one compressible member the less range of pivot the platform has relative to the base. 15. The wobble board of claim 2, wherein the axial force is at least partially from a force being applied to a top surface of the platform. 16. The wobble board of claim 15, wherein the force applied to the top surface of the platform is from a user standing on the platform. 17. The wobble board of any one of claims 1 to 16, wherein the base is positioned on a support surface, the support defining a pivot limit of the platform. 18. The wobble board of claim 17, wherein at least a portion of the platform is in contact with the support surface when at the pivot limit. 19. The wobble board of any one of claims 1 to 18 wherein the at least one compressible member is made of one of an elastic material, a rubber material and a foam material. 20. The wobble board of any one of claims 1 to 19 wherein the at least one compressible member has a rounded top surface. 21. The wobble board of any one of claims 1 to 20 wherein the at least one compressible member compresses axially. 22. The wobble board of any one of claims 1 to 21 wherein the at least one compressible member expands radially when compressed axially.
